title: ICU高危药物安全提示
summary: 用于AI风险分析与用药联动的本地药品标签摘要。

sections.text: Vancomycin exposure is associated with nephrotoxicity risk, especially with high trough concentration, prolonged duration, or concomitant nephrotoxic agents. Monitor renal function and drug levels.
Heparin-induced thrombocytopenia should be suspected with platelet fall >50 percent typically between day 5 and 10 of heparin exposure.
